column1: # NOT from the generator — cases the synthetic generator never makes:
#  • real aggressive abbreviations people actually type (often 2-4 chars);
#  • "keep" cases: a real word that must stay itself (expected == input).
# This is a STRESS set, not a regression gate — low scores are findings.
# Run: abbrev bench data/bench/adversarial.tsv --lexicon data/lexicons/ru-50k.tsv --lm data/lm/ru-lm.tsv
# ultra-short (2 chars) — below the fuzzy threshold; reachable only via the
# exact-match shortcut layer. Run with `--shortcuts data/shortcuts/ru.tsv`
# to resolve these (top-1 100%); without it they MISS, documenting the gap.
# "keep": a real frequent word must remain itself (expected == input)
